quotes.text: Don't call yourself a programmer. Call yourself something that sounds like you make or save the company money.
quotes.author: Patrick McKenzie (patio11)

quotes.text: The best career advice is: nobody is coming to save you. You have to build your own thing.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your first job teaches you skills. Your second teaches you politics. Your third teaches you which one matters more.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to get promoted is to do the job you want, not the job you have. But don't do it for free.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Side projects are the best career insurance. They prove you can build things, not just talk about them.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to update your resume is when you don't need one. The second best is when you're too late.
quotes.author: based
